gravitixDocs.title: Gravitix Kasa Nkyer…õkyer…õmu

gravitixDocs.introDesc: Gravitix y…õ kasa a …õfa domain p…îtee bi (DSL) a w…îay…õ fi mfiase s…õ w…îde b…õkyer…õw Vortex bots. Baabi a kasa afoforo hwehw…õ nhomakorabea, callbacks, ne boilerplate no, Gravitix ma wo event handlers a edi kan, nk…îmm…îb…î flows, ne built-in state ‚Äî ne nyinaa w…î syntax a …õho tew, a wotumi kenkan a Rust na …õkanyan no mu.

gravitixDocs.goalReadable: Readable ‚Äî code kenkan te s…õ adwene, …õny…õ mfiri
gravitixDocs.goalSafe: Safe ‚Äî static types kyere mfomso ansa na runtime aba
gravitixDocs.goalExpressive: Expressive ‚Äî flows, guards, ne pattern matching y…õ nea w…îasisi w…î mu
gravitixDocs.goalMinimal: Minimal ‚Äî adesua biara nni h…î, agyapade biara nni h…î, nhyehy…õe biara nni h…î a …õs…õ s…õ wosua

Saa ns…õm a w…îde gyina so yi kyer…õkyer…õ Gravitix fi nnyinasos…õm ahorow a edi kan mu: osuahu biara a edi kan ho nhia.
